entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A grain crop of significant economic importance in several African countries, used in confectionery and malting industries.

entities.name: SUDAN SAVANNAH OF NIGERIA
entities.description: The geographical region in Nigeria where the productivity study was conducted.

entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: A grain crop that sorghum is used to complement or substitute in industrial applications.

entities.name: BARLEY
entities.description: A grain crop that sorghum is used to complement or substitute in industrial applications.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The measure of grain production per unit area, which the project aimed to increase.

entities.name: AGRONOMIC PRACTICES
entities.description: Agricultural management techniques used to improve crop productivity.

entities.name: THEMATIC TRAINING
entities.description: Educational activities provided to farmers and extension agents to improve their knowledge of farming practices.

entities.name: ON-FARM TECHNOLOGY DEMONSTRATIONS
entities.description: Practical displays of improved agricultural technologies conducted directly on farms.

entities.name: COMMUNITY SEED PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of producing quality seeds within local communities to increase accessibility.

entities.name: INNOVATION PLATFORMS
entities.description: Collaborative structures designed to facilitate market linkages and technology adoption.

entities.name: MARKET LINKAGES
entities.description: Connections established between farmers and large-scale processors to improve market access.

entities.name: IMPROVED TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: A set of advanced agricultural inputs and practices, including improved varieties and seed dressing.

entities.name: POST-HARVEST HANDLING
entities.description: Techniques used to manage crops after harvest to reduce loss and maintain quality.

entities.name: IMPROVED VARIETIES
entities.description: Crop varieties developed for higher productivity and better traits.

entities.name: SEED DRESSING
entities.description: The application of protective chemicals to seeds before planting to improve germination and yield.

entities.name: TILLAGE PRACTICES
entities.description: Methods of soil preparation used to optimize crop growth.

entities.name: SEED FAIRS
entities.description: Events used to reach non-participating farmers and promote improved production technologies.

entities.name: AUDIO-VISUAL BROADCASTS
entities.description: The use of radio and other media to disseminate information on production technologies and market availability.

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD INCOME
entities.description: The economic earnings of farming households, which increased due to improved yields and market access.

entities.name: ICRISAT NIGERIA
entities.description: The organization that implemented the Agricultural Transformation Support Project in collaboration with partners.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL TRANSFORMATION SUPPORT PROJECT
entities.description: The project (ATASP-1) focused on increasing sorghum productivity through technology and market access.
